query_title: Louis C.K.: Live at the Beacon Theater

recommendations.title: Louis C.K.: Hilarious
recommendations.overview: In this unique and dynamic live concert experience, Louis C.K.'s exploration of life after 40 destroys politically correct images of modern life with thoughts we have all had...but would rarely admit to.

recommendations.title: Louis C.K. 2017
recommendations.overview: Louis C.K. muses on religion, eternal love, giving dogs drugs, email fights, teachers and more in a live performance from Washington, D.C.

recommendations.title: Louis C.K.: Live at The Comedy Store
recommendations.overview: This material was developed and prepared over the last year or so, mostly in comedy clubs. This special kind of goes back to when he used to just make noises and be funny for no particular reason. It felt right to him to shoot this special in a club

recommendations.title: Sincerely Louis C.K.
recommendations.overview: Louis C.K. muses on religion, terrorism, small towns, Florida, disabilities, dogs, Auschwitz, marriage, sex, vegans, and his personal sexual controversy, in a live performance from Washington, D.C.

recommendations.title: Louis C.K.: Chewed Up
recommendations.overview: Profane, vulgar and obscenely funny, Louis C.K. insists on telling the truth, whether you like it or not! Join the Emmy Award-winning stand-up comic and TV star (Lucky Louie) as he shares his thoughts on the stuff everyone thinks about -- male bodily

recommendations.title: Louis C.K.: Oh My God
recommendations.overview: Filmed at the Celebrity Theatre in Phoenix, AZ on February 15th and 16th, 2013, Oh My God is Louis C.K.'s fifth stand-up special, his first for HBO since 2007's Shameless, and his first since winning a Emmy Award for writing on his acclaimed show on

recommendations.title: London
recommendations.overview: London is a drug laden adventure that centers on a party in a New York loft where a young man is trying to win back his ex-girlfriend.

recommendations.title: Louis C.K.: Shameless
recommendations.overview: Louis C.K. is back on HBO in an ALL-NEW hour of raw no-holds-barred stand-up comedy! The creator and star of the 2006 comedy series Lucky Louie, performs in front of a live audience in LA at the Henry Fonda Theater. Louis C.K. covers issues near and

recommendations.title: Pootie Tang
recommendations.overview: Pootie Tang, the musician/actor/folk hero of the ghetto, is chronicled from his early childhood to his battles against the evil Corporate America, who try to steal his magic belt and make him sell out by endorsing addictive products to his people. Po

recommendations.title: Miraculous World: Shanghai - The Legend of Ladydragon
recommendations.overview: On school break, Marinette heads to Shanghai to meet Adrien. But after arriving, Marinette loses all her stuff, including the Miraculous that allows her to turn into Ladybug!
